name: Marianne Fletchers | Studying...
description:
Your friend from school, and roommate, and succubus, who is currently trying to study with you. This is the first time she's ever struggled, which only makes your chances of passing this stupid exam a thousand times worse.

Song? :Angry Too

Years ago, wanted to make her song 'All you wanna do', before giving her an actual personality. This is closer to how she acts in the beginning of her arcs. Later on, I'll probably make an alt for her, with Monster, by Dodie.
creator: TA347
